narration: Bacteria evolve fast – faster than our antibiotics.
visual_description: Hook visual: Bacteria evolve fast – faster than our antibiotics.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Bacteria evolve fast – faster than our antibiotics.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Bacteria evolve fast – faster than our antibiotics.

narration: This isn't just science fiction. It's happening now with antibiotic resistance.
visual_description: Context visual: This isn't just science fiction. It's happening now with antibiotic resistance.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: This isn't just science fiction. It's happening now with antibiotic resistance.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: This isn't just science fiction. It's happening now with antibiotic resistance.

narration: Every time we misuse antibiotics, we create selection pressure, speeding up the evolution of superbugs.
visual_description: Escalation visual: Every time we misuse antibiotics, we create selection pressure, speeding up the evolution of superbugs.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: Every time we misuse antibiotics, we create selection pressure, speeding up the evolution of superbugs.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: Every time we misuse antibiotics, we create selection pressure, speeding up the evolution of superbugs.

narration: The CDC warns that these superbugs could lead to untreatable infections worldwide.
visual_description: Evidence visual: The CDC warns that these superbugs could lead to untreatable infections worldwide.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: The CDC warns that these superbugs could lead to untreatable infections worldwide.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: The CDC warns that these superbugs could lead to untreatable infections worldwide.

narration: But there's hope. Good stewardship can slow this process. Use antibiotics wisely.
visual_description: Payoff visual: But there's hope. Good stewardship can slow this process. Use antibiotics wisely.
ai_image_prompt: Payoff visual: But there's hope. Good stewardship can slow this process. Use antibiotics wisely.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Payoff visual: But there's hope. Good stewardship can slow this process. Use antibiotics wisely.

narration: Stay informed, share this knowledge, and help fight antibiotic resistance.
